hypothesis: Completed DAX or gold bars before the US cash entry can contain cross-asset risk information that is distinct from the incumbent trade streams.

data.timestamp_basis: Darwinex broker-wall converted to UTC before joining

causal_contract.signal: Source close-to-close move over completed M15 bars, normalized by source ATR56.
causal_contract.join: The newest source bar must have completed no later than the target entry and no more than 30 minutes earlier.
causal_contract.entry: Target session open plus 0, 2, or 4 M15 bars.

selection_contract.winner_score: maximum of min(development PF, validation PF), then trade count
selection_contract.holdout_open_rule: Open 2024-2025 only for the single global winner if every preholdout gate passes.
selection_contract.holdout_pass_rule: At least 100 trades, PF >= 1.10, positive pooled net R, and positive 2024 and 2025 net R.

label: RESEARCH_ONLY_NO_GO
